## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix (non‑breaking)
- [ ] New feature (non‑breaking)
- [ ] Breaking change (requires a major version bump)
- [ ] Documentation / tooling

## Checklist

- [ ] Code passes `ruff check` and `ruff format --check`
- [ ] Unit tests added or updated (`pytest`)
- [ ] No new runtime dependencies added without ADR
- [ ] No secrets, tokens, or real data in committed files
- [ ] Conventional Commits used for all commit messages
- [ ] ADR written if this introduces a significant architectural change
